name: Import Military Munitions Connections
description: Imports typed connections for military munitions: missiles, rockets, bombs, torpedoes, grenades, artillery shells, ammunition. Extracts has_type, made_by, designed_by, originated_in, used_in (wars), operated_by, has_variant. No LLM required.

args.help: Also include guided_by (guidance system), has_warhead, launched_from
